product_name: Accord Oud Byredofor women and men
product_description: Accord OudbyByredois a Oriental Spicy fragrance for women and men.Accord Oudwas launched in 2010. Top notes are Blackberry, Rum and Saffron; middle notes are Leather, Agarwood (Oud) and Clary Sage; base notes are Patchouli and Musk.Oud possesses a great cultural significance because of its use in traditional incense and perfumes, and it is also mentioned in one of the world's oldest written texts - the Sanskrit Vedas from India. When the once light Aquilaria tree heartwood becomes infected with a specific type of mold, it defends itself with a dark and fragrant protective resin. This now dark wood, oud or agarwood, holds a complex fragrance, resembling few or no other natural ingredients.Accord Oud composition blends agar with fresh leather accord, blonde woods, spices (saffron, cinnamon) and black plum. It is composed of blackberries, saffron and rum top notes, with the heart of leather and clary sage and the base of patchouli and powdery musk.Its is available as Eau de Parfum in 50 ml and 100 ml bottles.

product_name: Alto Astral Byredofor women and men
product_description: Alto AstralbyByredois a Floral Aldehyde fragrance for women and men. This is a new fragrance.Alto Astralwas launched in 2025. The nose behind this fragrance is Jérôme Epinette. Top notes are Coconut Water and Aldehydes; middle notes are Musk, Incense and Jasmine; base notes are Sandalwood, Cashmeran and Amber.WithAlto Astral, Byredo unveils a luminous new chapter in its olfactory narrative—a fragrance that pays vibrant homage to the emotional topography of Brazil. Taking its name from a Brazilian Portuguese phrase evoking elevated mood and spiritual brightness,Alto Astraldistills the soul of optimism, rhythm, and cultural vitality into scent.Radiating with the color, energy, and warmth of Brazil,Alto Astralis inspired by the country’s everyday poetry: samba at sundown, the salty rush of ocean winds, motorcyclists weaving through Rio’s streets with effortless flair. This fragrance is more than a composition—it’s a shared emotional resonance. A sensory portrait of collective exuberance that persists, pulses, and uplifts.FROM RIO: JOY AS A STATE OF BEINGThe campaign, lensed by Rio-born photographer Rafael Moura, unfolds in three intimate visual acts—dance, beach, and street—each an ode to the raw beauty of life in Rio de Janeiro. Raised in the favelas, Moura brings a lens shaped by authenticity and personal narrative. Through his eye, fleeting moments become enduring stories: samba artist Duda Almeida, model Emilly Nunes, and a local riding crew are not posed subjects but vessels of spontaneous truth. Their presence embodiesalto astralnot as aesthetic, but as essence.The moving image campaign, directed by Brazilian filmmaker Breno Moreira, deepens the sensory experience with cinematic fluidity. Shot entirely on location in Rio, it transforms joy into identity—an unfiltered celebration of resilience, rhythm, and radiant presence.THE OLFACTORY COMPOSITIONCrafted by longtime Byredo collaborator Jérome Epinette,Alto Astralopens with a vibrant interplay of aldehydes and creamy coconut—an effervescent yet soft introduction that captivates immediately. At its heart, jasmine petals entwine with airy incense and milky musk, forming an abstract warmth that seems to hover just above the skin. The base unveils a sensual trail of sandalwood, cashmere wood, and salted amber, offering texture, depth, and lingering luminosity.Balancing clarity with comfort, freshness with familiarity,Alto Astralis a fragrance of emotional light—an olfactive expression of upliftment and ease.Presented in Byredo’s signature flacon—minimalist, sculptural, and weighty—the design remains a quiet frame for the story within. A simple white label marksAlto Astral, allowing the fragrance itself to speak: pure, resonant, and unmistakably alive.

Top notes are Juniper Berries and Californian Lemon; middle notes are Patchouli and Iris; base notes are Sand, Musk and Immortelle.Oliver Peoples & Byredo launch limited summer collection which includes perfume and sunglasses created in style and colors to fit each other. The collection was inspired by the phenomenon of synthesis joining thought, styles and views of the direction of both brands."Ben and I share similar views on the positioning of brand and esthetics. We share similar views of positioning of the brand and esthetics. We have always wanted to work on a project together." -says David Schulte, Oliver Peoples CEO. "A year ago he invited me and said the word ‘synthesis’ which I never heard before. I liked it and we developed concept by joining LA influence of vision and fashion. Oliver Peoples has never created anything else but glasses, so venturing into fragrance was a big deal for us. I cannot imagine anyone better than Byredo to do that with."The concept of the new limited collection is extremely interesting, since master perfumer of the house of Byredo got the task to observe the sights of Los Angeles through different colors of lenses, to visualize the scent and to interpret it into a layered composition.The unique idea resulted in created glasses in color paired with sunglasses frame in the same shades, color of perfume flacon and skilfully nuanced composition of the fragrance. The whole concept is very modern and aimed at men and women. Sunglasses frame and fragrances are unisex. Face of the advertising campaign Oliver Peoples & Byredo is model Frida Gustavsson (on the photo).According to Oliver Peoples, the frames are available in two colors (Semi Matte Black and Beige Crystal) while glass for the unisex sunglasses can be chosen in three shades (Indigo, Champagne and Green). Fragrances and sunglasses will be available separately and in special sets, together and paired per colors. Flacons of the new fragrance go with colors of glass and are created in the same shades: indigo, champagne and green."I have admired Oliver Peoples since I felt their approach to a product similar to ours in Byredo brand. It was very important to me that this partnership has the right reason for existence and synthesis, and the idea of a joint perception was ideal for a joint venture. I met artists, musicians and perfumers who present characteristics of the so-called disorder and I was always fascinated by clarity of their descriptions" - stated Ben Gorham, creative director and owner of Byredo.Fragrance Oliver Peoples Byredo arrives in concentration Eau de Parfum 50ml as limited edition. Within the bottle, the hue of the Absolu de Parfum is intensified, offering a visual hint at the rich concentration of fragrance inside."

product_name: Ambre Levant Louis Vuittonfor women and men
product_description: Ambre LevantbyLouis Vuittonis a Oriental Woody fragrance for women and men. This is a new fragrance.Ambre Levantwas launched in 2026. The nose behind this fragrance is Jacques Cavallier Belletrud. Top notes are Cinnamon and Mandarin; middle notes are Incense and White Pepper; base notes are Amber, Ambergris, Oud and Labdanum.There is a moment when the world takes on a profound intensity—when the sun begins its descent and the sky turns to amber just before surrendering to the night. In this captivating golden hour, the sky still holds the warmth of the day, while its memory lingers gently in the air.From one horizon to the other, this luminous glow envelops the landscape, softening boundaries and erasing distance. It carries a unique power of attraction. Gradually, the world seems transformed by a new energy, as the first stirrings of evening begin to unfold. Everything quickens and intensifies, as if moved by a single, shared impulse.Ambre Levant is born from this fleeting instant, when amber light rises and unites sky and earth in a seamless wash of color. At its heart lies “black gold,” an emblematic treasure of Middle Eastern perfumery, which deepens the composition and amplifies its intensity tenfold. For Jacques Cavallier Belletrud, it is among the most sensual of woods—unique and of exceptional quality. Its refined woody character reveals a subtle animality, balanced by an elegance that is both spicy and warmly ambered.With its absolute amber signature, Ambre Levant captures the light of the golden hour and extends its radiance onto the skin.The iconic Louis Vuitton flacon, crafted in transparent black glass, is reimagined here in a deep, warm amber hue. It appears to glow from within, as though infused with the very light of sunset. This 100 ml Eau de Parfum bottle is also designed to be refilled at select stores equipped with a perfume fountain.

product_name: Apogée Louis Vuittonfor women
product_description: ApogéebyLouis Vuittonis a Floral fragrance for women.Apogéewas launched in 2016. The nose behind this fragrance is Jacques Cavallier Belletrud. Top notes are Tangerine and Orange; middle notes are Lily-of-the-Valley, Magnolia, Jasmine and Rose; base notes are White Musk, Guaiac Wood and Sandalwood.The long-awaited perfume from the luxury French fashion brand Louis Vuitton arrives in September 2016. The creation process took over four years, including establishing the creative atelier Les Fontains Parfumées in Grasse with Jacques Cavallier Belletrud in the position of in-house perfumer. The license belongs to the LVMH company. Les Parfums Louis Vuitton transmit journeys of emotions and aromatic adventures.Seven luxurious fragrances are presented in the collection: Rose des Vents, Matière Noire, Mille Feux, Apogée, Turbulences, Dans la Peau and Contre Moi.The fragrances are feminine and floral, with names that aim to highlight the emotional narrative rather than the ingredients."From the airiness of Rose des Vents to the intoxicating Turbulences, the ecstasy of a first night with Dans la Peau to the mindful immersion in nature with Apogée; from the self-revealing Contre Moi to an exploration of a darker side with Matière Noire and the explosion of the senses with Mille Feux… Les parfums Louis Vuitton describe a journey of the emotions."Apogee, a delicate floral fragrance, features Grasse jasmine as the main ingredient with lily of the valley, rose, magnolia, guaiac wood and sandalwood.The face of the campaign is French actress Léa Seydoux.The bottles are designed by Marc Newson, made of heavy glass to look like minimalist versions of apothecary vials with metal caps featuring the LV emblem. The price of each bottle is $240.The fragrances are available in 100 and 200 ml Eau de Parfum, with additional travel spray set of four x 7.5 ml and a limited edition set of all seven miniatures x 10 ml.

Étoile Filante means "shooting star", and the fragrance is said to stand for a precious nectar celebrating joy and hope, a journey for the senses, housed in the signature bottle of fragrances of the house."A ball of fire in the heart of night, the shooting star shines bright in the heavenly vault.Its odyssey through the infinite culminates in a furious race, illuminating a nightas black as ink and tracing out a radiant future — one that brings people together.A dancing star that dazzles; a metaphor for a borderless journey that connectsone with oneself as much as others."A shooting star that signifies joy and happiness is chosen as a symbol of hope and the realization of dreams. Top notes are Raspberry and Bergamot; middle notes are Rose, Saffron, Osmanthus, Iris and Jasmine; base notes are Leather, Orris Root, Moss, Sandalwood and Patchouli.The long-awaited perfume from the luxury French fashion brand Louis Vuitton arrives in September 2016. The creation process took over four years, including establishing the creative atelier Les Fontains Parfumées in Grasse with Jacques Cavallier Belletrud in the position of in-house perfumer. The license belongs to the LVMH company. Les Parfums Louis Vuitton transmit journeys of emotions and aromatic adventures.Seven luxurious fragrances are presented in the collection: Rose des Vents, Matière Noire, Mille Feux, Apogée, Turbulences, Dans la Peau and Contre Moi.The fragrances are feminine and floral, with names that aim to highlight the emotional narrative rather than the ingredients."From the airiness of Rose des Vents to the intoxicating Turbulences, the ecstasy of a first night with Dans la Peau to the mindful immersion in nature with Apogée; from the self-revealing Contre Moi to an exploration of a darker side with Matière Noire and the explosion of the senses with Mille Feux… Les parfums Louis Vuitton describe a journey of the emotions."Mille Feux is the scent of signature leather with raspberry and osmanthus.The face of the campaign is French actress Léa Seydoux.The bottles are designed by Marc Newson, made of heavy glass to look like minimalist versions of apothecary vials with metal caps featuring the LV emblem. The price of each bottle is $240. The fragrances are available in 100 and 200 ml Eau de Parfum, with additional travel spray set of four x 7.5 ml and a limited edition set of all seven miniatures x 10 ml.
base_notes: Leather, Orris Root, Moss, Sandalwood, Patchouli

product_name: Monogram Attrape-Rêves Louis Vuittonfor women
product_description: Monogram Attrape-RêvesbyLouis Vuittonis a Floral Fruity Gourmand fragrance for women. This is a new fragrance.Monogram Attrape-Rêveswas launched in 2026. The nose behind this fragrance is Jacques Cavallier Belletrud. Top note is Litchi; middle notes are Peony and Cocoa; base note is Patchouli.Monogram Attrape-Rêves by Louis Vuitton is a limited-edition presentation of the house’s Attrape-Rêves fragrance, created to mark 130 years of the Louis Vuitton Monogram. The scent retains the original composition by Jacques Cavallier Belletrud, built around contrasts where an airy peony accord is combined with a gourmand touch of raw cocoa powder, brightened by fresh, sparkling litchi and grounded with a refined patchouli heart. This edition is distinguished primarily by its special bottle and packaging, which feature archival Monogram motifs in vibrant tones to echo the fragrance’s lively character.

product_name: Monogram eLVes Louis Vuittonfor women
product_description: Monogram eLVesbyLouis Vuittonis a Floral Fruity fragrance for women. This is a new fragrance.Monogram eLVeswas launched in 2026. The nose behind this fragrance is Jacques Cavallier Belletrud. Top notes are Peach, Black Currant, Ginger and Cinnamon; middle notes are Fruity Notes, Rose, Coconut Milk and Lily of the Valley; base notes are Ambroxan and Patchouli.Monogram eLVes by Louis Vuitton is described as a contemporary floral fragrance created by Master Perfumer Jacques Cavallier Belletrud. Conceived as a tribute to the women associated with the house and to 130 years of the Louis Vuitton monogram motif, it presents the brand’s archival signature scent in a limited-edition presentation with coordinated bottle and packaging, which can be refilled in selected Louis Vuitton stores. The composition centers on rose centifolia extracted with carbon dioxide, supported by lily of the valley and unspecified fruity notes that lend a brighter, more playful nuance to the floral heart. In the base, ambroxan and a touch of patchouli introduce a modern, warm and slightly mineral-woody facet, creating a contrast between airy florals and deeper, more resonant tones. The fragrance is positioned as a feminine scent with broad, contemporary appeal.
middle_notes: Fruity Notes, Rose, Coconut Milk, Lily of the Valley

product_name: Monogram Imagination Louis Vuittonfor men
product_description: Monogram ImaginationbyLouis Vuittonis a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for men. This is a new fragrance.Monogram Imaginationwas launched in 2026. The nose behind this fragrance is Jacques Cavallier Belletrud. Top notes are Citruses and Bergamot; middle notes are Neroli and Spices; base notes are Chinese Black Tea, Ambroxan and Amber.Monogram Imagination by Louis Vuitton is a limited collector's edition of the men's fragrance Imagination, created to mark the 130th anniversary of the house's Monogram motif. The composition, signed by Master Perfumer Jacques Cavallier Belletrud, is built around an exceptionally high dose of Ambroxan and a modern interpretation of an amber accord, contrasted with luminous citrus notes. Chinese black tea obtained by carbon dioxide extraction adds an aromatic, slightly smoky nuance that reinforces the travel-inspired character of the scent.While the fragrance itself follows the structure of the original Imagination, this edition is distinguished by its specially designed, signed bottle and coordinated packaging that revisit classic Louis Vuitton signatures in contemporary tones.

product_name: Pur Ambre Louis Vuittonfor women and men
product_description: Pur AmbrebyLouis Vuittonis a Oriental fragrance for women and men.Pur Ambrewas launched in 2024. The nose behind this fragrance is Jacques Cavallier Belletrud. The fragrance features Ambergris and Ambroxan.With Pure Perfumes, Louis Vuitton imagines a way of personalizing one's fragrance signature with a gesture of absolute refinement. Inspired by the tradition of layering several fragrances, these intense compositions can be used as a finishing touch to your perfume ritual. Woven from exceptional essences and concentrated to the extreme, they celebrate the raw beauty of legendary ingredients in perfumery.A traveling material by its very nature, ambergris has fascinated mankind since the dawn of time. Jacques Cavallier Belletrud pays tribute to the absolute sensuality of its scent by marrying an infusion of natural ambergris with the woody, musky, velvety vibrancy of Ambroxan. A scintillating burst of freshness gradually reveals a complex scent shimmering with animalic, woody and iodized facets. Endowed with an unparalleled power of attraction, Pur Ambre captures the utmost mystery of ambergris, captivatingly exuding seduction in successive waves.

product_description: Pur SantalbyLouis Vuittonis a Woody Floral Musk fragrance for women and men.Pur Santalwas launched in 2024. The nose behind this fragrance is Jacques Cavallier Belletrud. The fragrance features Sandal and Musk.With Pure Perfumes, Louis Vuitton imagines a way of personalizing one's fragrance signature with a gesture of absolute refinement. Inspired by the tradition of layering several fragrances, these intense compositions can be used as a finishing touch to your perfume ritual. Woven from exceptional essences and concentrated to the extreme, they celebrate the raw beauty of legendary ingredients in perfumery.Sacred in many cultures, sandalwood is a key ingredient in the perfumer's palette: powerful yet delicate, its creamy, velvety scent can evoke that of the skin itself. Fascinated by its rare sophistication, Jacques Cavallier Belletrud elevates it majestically in Pur Santal, which combines an extraordinary Sri Lankan essence with two ethereal, musky floral notes endowed with exceptional diffusion. In their radiant presence, sandalwood reveals the incomparable elegance of its character.
